briefdescription.para: lower border (only for an internal evaluation)
The value of swap double words.
The value of swap four words.
upper border (only for an internal evaluation)
Enumeration type to specify the swap control.

simplesect.para: This enumeration type is used to specify the swap control.

detaileddescription.para: The type of image data a picture buffer holds.

simplesect.para: MVDU_FXQuad requires PIC_BUF_TYPE_YCbCr422 in PIC_BUF_LAYOUT_SEMIPLANAR mode.
This is a enum of RDCE bit depth.
This is a enum of RDCE bayer pattern.

detaileddescription.para: The layout of the image data a picture buffer holds.

simplesect.para: MVDU_FXQuad requires PIC_BUF_TYPE_YCbCr422 in PIC_BUF_LAYOUT_SEMIPLANAR mode.

detaileddescription.para: The align mode of the image data a picture buffer holds.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration type to specify the order of YUV or RGB channel, Right now only surpport RGB888 format.
Enumeration type to specify the swap control.

simplesect.para: This enumeration type is used to specify the swap control.

briefdescription.para: Union type to specify the raw and yuv swap control.

simplesect.para: This union type is used to specify the raw and yuv swap control.

detaileddescription.para: The type of image data a picture buffer holds.

simplesect.para: MVDU_FXQuad requires PIC_BUF_TYPE_YCbCr422 in PIC_BUF_LAYOUT_SEMIPLANAR mode.
This is a enum of RDCE bit depth.
This is a enum of RDCE bayer pattern.

detaileddescription.para: The layout of the image data a picture buffer holds.

simplesect.para: MVDU_FXQuad requires PIC_BUF_TYPE_YCbCr422 in PIC_BUF_LAYOUT_SEMIPLANAR mode.

detaileddescription.para: The align mode of the image data a picture buffer holds.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration type to specify the order of YUV or RGB channel, Right now only surpport RGB888 format.
The MediaBufferPool holds elements from type MediaBuffer_t.

detaileddescription.para: Common information about a color component plane within an image buffer.

briefdescription.para: Cam Engine integer range information structure.
Cam Engine ccm manual configuration structure.

detaileddescription.para: All the meta data one needs to know about an image buffer.
